name: Esteban Valencia

hero.title: I build AI, data, and automation systems that turn messy inputs into productized tools, APIs, and decision workflows.
hero.body: This profile is the technical layer: active builds, open-source proof, private work I can describe publicly, and the AI signals I keep an eye on every day.

now: Building retrieval, validation, and scoring systems across AI + data workflows.
Shipping repo-native tools where geospatial, finance, and ML sharpen decisions — not live as silos.

activeBuilds.name: niche-radar
activeBuilds.summary: Niche finder backed by external sources, built to turn noisy market inputs into decision-ready signals.

activeBuilds.name: ingo
activeBuilds.summary: Shell-first RAG CLI for PDFs, OCR, embeddings, and vector search without a heavy app runtime.

activeBuilds.name: li-jobs
activeBuilds.summary: Jobs collection API surface for scraping, normalization, and downstream job-data workflows.

openSourceTools.name: open_ksa
openSourceTools.summary: Python utility for working with Saudi Arabia's open data platform across thousands of datasets.

openSourceTools.name: tidyup
openSourceTools.summary: CLI utility for sorting files and folders by extension and date, built as reusable housekeeping tooling.

openSourceTools.name: translagent
openSourceTools.summary: Translation app with transliteration and audio support, showing end-to-end AI product packaging.

privateSystems.name: Purchase-Likelihood Scoring Pipeline
privateSystems.summary: Built and operationalized propensity scoring for campaign targeting, improving margin on retail marketing workflows.

privateSystems.name: Geodatabase Validation Toolkit
privateSystems.summary: Private Python tooling for validating ESRI geodatabases and companion Excel deliverables against configurable rules.

privateSystems.name: ATS Scanner
privateSystems.summary: Deterministic resume parsing and job-fit scoring service with explicit evaluation contracts and failure handling.

workWithMe.title: Work With Me
workWithMe.body: If you need someone who can connect model behavior, data systems, APIs, and the automation layer around them, start with [the broader portfolio](https://works.estebanvalencia.com) or reach out on [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/valest).
